channel.title: Moonstone Games Devlog
channel.description: Notes from the road to Early Access for Verdant Hollow.

item.title: Greyboxing the Sunken Marsh
item.description: How we blocked out the Act 2 wetland and what the verticality taught us.

item.title: Designing the Hollow King
item.description: Three phases, one tell per phase, and why readability beats spectacle.

item.title: What 1200 wishlists taught us about our hook
item.description: The numbers behind the demo and the messaging changes we are making.

item.title: Rebuilding the inventory grid
item.description: Why the drag and drop kept dropping items, and how the 0.8.3 rework fixes it.
